# How to Navigate the Next Generation of Payment Fraud

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

This webinar explores the alarming rise in payment fraud across various industries, fueled by macroeconomic factors, evolving consumer behavior, and the double-edged sword of AI technology. Gain insights into the latest payment fraud trends, understand the impact on businesses and consumers, and learn how AI-driven fraud prevention can help them stay ahead of the curve.

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
